defaultSeo.title: Horeca | website template for restaurants, cafes, hotels, and delivery
defaultSeo.description: Horeca is a ready website template for restaurants, cafes, hotels, bars, food delivery, and catering. Present menus, photos, contacts, reservations, events, offers, and social channels on a fast SEO-friendly website.
defaultSeo.author: Horeca

/.title: Venue menu | Horeca
/.description: Restaurant, cafe, hotel, or delivery menu in the Horeca template: breakfasts, mains, drinks, desserts, and seasonal offers in one digital menu.

/favorites.title: Favorite dishes | Horeca
/favorites.description: Review selected menu items in the Horeca template and quickly return to favorite dishes.

/rooms.title: Rooms and stays | Horeca
/rooms.description: Rooms and accommodation page for a hotel, aparthotel, or guest house in the Horeca template.

/navigation.title: Site navigation | Horeca
/navigation.description: Quick access to all main HoReCa website pages.

/gallery.title: Venue gallery | Horeca
/gallery.description: Photos of the interior, dishes, serving, and atmosphere of a restaurant, cafe, or hotel in the Horeca template.

/dish.title: Dish page | Horeca
/dish.description: SEO page for a single dish with description, ingredients, and related menu items in the Horeca template.

/discounts.title: Discounts and special offers | Horeca
/discounts.description: Show seasonal offers, discounts, combo deals, and special guest terms on the discounts page.

/loyalty.title: Loyalty program
/loyalty.description: A simple loyalty program page for rewards, benefits, loyalty levels, birthday offers, and current program terms.

/articles.title: News and articles | Horeca
/articles.description: Publish news, team stories, seasonal menu updates, and useful articles for guests.

/quests.title: Quests and activities | Horeca
/quests.description: A dedicated page for quests, entertainment, and themed activities in a venue or hotel.

/questions.title: Common questions | Horeca
/questions.description: Answers to common guest questions about booking, opening hours, delivery, menu, events, and stays.

/rules.title: Venue rules | Horeca
/rules.description: Guest rules for Horeca: restaurant, hotel, events, safety, booking, and shared spaces on one page.

/reviews.title: Guest reviews | Horeca
/reviews.description: Collect and show guest reviews, ratings, and social proof for a restaurant, cafe, or hotel.

/events.title: Events and celebrations | Horeca
/events.description: A page for event calendars, banquets, live music, tastings, and private celebrations in a HoReCa venue.

/products.title: Products and gifts | Horeca
/products.description: Present gift sets, merch, farm products, or related goods on a dedicated page.

/jobs.title: Jobs | Horeca
/jobs.description: A dedicated SEO page for restaurant, cafe, hotel, or delivery service jobs.

/team.title: Venue team | Horeca
/team.description: Introduce guests to the chef, baristas, managers, and service team on the team page.

/socials.title: Contacts and social networks | Horeca
/socials.description: Phone, email, address, messengers, and social networks for a HoReCa business on one page.
